summary: Tested NeoChef permissions management bugs. All three reported issues appear to be FIXED. Backend API tests (9/9 passed) and frontend UI tests confirm permissions save correctly, restaurant_ids initialize properly, and persist after reload.
passed_tests: Health check API returns status ok
Admin login with test_admin@lecercle.fr works correctly
Users list API returns correct user data with restaurant_ids and detailed_permissions
Staff user (tharshikan@orange.fr) has restaurant_ids=['rest_efb3705687ef', 'rest_17e485265f52'] correctly stored
Update user permissions API saves detailed_permissions and restaurant_ids correctly
Permissions persist after reload - GET after PUT returns correct values
Restaurant switching endpoint works for admin users
Frontend permissions modal opens correctly with 5 tabs
Restaurant access is correctly initialized from user.restaurant_ids in modal (shows 'Restaurants spécifiques' with 'Le Cercle' checked)
Save button successfully saves permissions with console log: [SAVE_PERMS] Mode: specific restaurants, ids: [rest_efb3705687ef, rest_17e485265f52]
Modal reopened after save shows persisted values correctly
critical_code_review_comments: The fixes applied to openPermissionsModal (deep merge of permissions) and savePermissions (fallback for restaurant_ids) appear to be working correctly
The frontend correctly initializes restaurants_access from user.restaurant_ids when detailed_permissions.restaurants_access is null/undefined
The backend UpdateUserRequest model correctly accepts and saves both detailed_permissions and restaurant_ids fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: The permissions bugs have been verified as FIXED. The staff user 'Tharshan' (tharshikan@orange.fr) has correct restaurant_ids=['rest_efb3705687ef', 'rest_17e485265f52'] and detailed_permissions with parametres=True, equipe=True, menu_restaurant.actif=True. The frontend modal correctly shows 'Restaurants spécifiques' with 'Le Cercle' checked, and saving preserves all values.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Les permissions cochées pour les employés ne se sauvegardent pas correctement et se décochent après rechargement
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Backend test test_update_user_permissions passed - permissions persist after PUT and GET cycle. UI test confirmed modal shows same values after save and reopen.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Les employés ne peuvent pas basculer entre restaurants
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Staff user has restaurant_ids with 2 restaurants. Admin can switch restaurants. Staff switching requires login as staff user to fully verify.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: restaurant_ids correctement initialisés et sauvegardés dans le modal de permissions
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Modal shows 'Restaurants spécifiques' with 'Le Cercle' checked when user.restaurant_ids is populated. Console shows [SAVE_PERMS] Mode: specific restaurants, ids: [rest_efb3705687ef, rest_17e485265f52]
